caption: A person holds a gold-bordered Kirby Puckett baseball card from the Minnesota Twins, which features a signature and the text "ONE OF ONE." The card includes a description of a "RIVERBOAT" World Series opener on "OCTOBER 17, 1987." In the background, a man wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt sits at a desk, looking down. The setting is a room with equipment and other cards visible on a surface. On-screen branding is present in the top right and bottom center, displaying the text "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" in red and white letters. As the scene progresses, the person holding the card subtly shifts their grip and angle, causing the light to glint off the reflective gold surface of the card. The man in the background remains seated, watching the card being showcased.
